purpose: Activity Log entry — 2026-05-14 Specialty Pharmacy sales-pitch framework decision (reusable IP)

text.content: SP sales-pitch framework — short/sweet, win office staff, don't info-overload

Pitch framework that landed Parmar + Langan today: 'Doc, our goal is to get those expensive biologics your patients sit on for the lowest out-of-pocket cost possible and delivered in a timely manner.' Keep it short. Less information = simpler close. Don't info-overload — give them the answer they're looking for. The real sellers are PA/office staff (40% PA acceptance rate is their pain). Office staff happy → orders flow direct to Insight Outpatient Pharmacy. Better PA from office team = lower lab expense for us. Permanent note: vault/notes/2026-05-14-sp-pitch-framework.md.

(1) Use this exact framing on every SP doctor intro going forward. (2) Build the simplified one-pager for doctors (Specialty Pharmacy subtask, 13d carry) — apply same 'short/sweet' principle. (3) Add office-staff angle to Document SP onboarding workflow 1-pager. (4) Tag pattern in Provider CRM for outcome tracking.
